MS. SILBAR RECEIVED SOME COPIES OF BANK STATEMENTS. SHE DID NOT GET THE TAX RETURN OR THE FINAL ACCOUNT. MR. KATZ IS WORKING ON THE FINAL ACCOUNT TO GET IT TO BALANCE. MS. SILBAR WILL SEND MR. KATZ A LIST OF ANYTHING THAT IS MISSING. COURT IS ORDERING MR. KATZ TO FILE THE FINAL ACCOUNT NO LATER THAN 01/30/06. HEARING DATE WILL BE SET WHEN THE ACCOUNTING IS FILED. ALL MATTERS ARE CONTINUED TO THE SAME DATE FOR HEARING ON THE FINAL ACCOUNT

COURT: THE ACCOUNTING IS NOT COMPLETED OR CORRECTED. RICHARD GENOVESE IS REMOVED AS TRUSTEE. LINDA GILBERT AND TOM COY ARE APPOINTED AS SUCCESSOR CO-TRUSTEES. N/B. MR. GENOVESE IS ORDERED TO TURN OVER ALL OF THE TRUST ASSETS TO THE SUCCESSOR CO-TRUSTEE WITHIN 10 DAYS. HE IS ORDERED NOT TO MAKE ANY DISTRIBUTIONS OR PAYMENTS FROM THE TRUST. ORDER IS HELD PENDING SETTLEMENT DISCUSSION. ALL THREE COUNSEL WILL TRY TO MEDIATE. BOND IS WAIVED IF ALL LIVING BENEFICIARIES CONSENT. ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Continued To May-03-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Milton Katz appearing for and with Richard Genovese. Lisa Silbar appearing by phone for Linda Gilbert. Chad Pratt appearing by phone for Tom Coy. Mr. Katz would like some time to respond to the examiner's notes and to other counsel's objections. Mr. Katz requested for mediation. All counsel agreed to mediation. Court is referring case to Pro Bono Mediation. Order signed. Mediation must be completed not later than 4/26. Matter is continued to 5/3 at 10:30am for status. On the issue of Mr. Genovese using trust funds to pay himself and his attorney after he was removed as trustee, court is allowing Mr. Katz to file a brief by 3/21. Other counsel to file response by 4/4. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
